statement: In every magma, Equation 678 (`x = y * (x * ((y * x) * z))`) implies Equation 2513 (`x = (y * ((x * z) * x)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0820
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op y x) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x z) x)) x)
